creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Maybe, it is the same as Bug #192106.

===>
( I uninstalled the port 

libsysinfo-0.0.2_1             GNU libc's sysinfo port for FreeBSD

from my machine and recompiled the emacs port again. And indeed that port was the culprit! The port compiled and installed fine on my machine without it being installed.  Thanks for the diligent work tracking down the culprit to that compiler error. )
